title: Add Heap Analytics to Application
description:
Integrate Heap Analytics into the DataTools Pro application to track user conversions and behavior from lead to sign-up. This provides detailed analytics on how the product is being used, enabling funnel analysis across the user lifecycle.

The Heap script was added to the application codebase to capture client-side user events automatically.
acceptance_criteria: Heap Analytics script is embedded in the application
User events from lead to sign-up are tracked automatically
Conversion funnel data is available in the Heap dashboard
implementation_notes: Heap script was already added to the codebase prior to ticket creation. Confirmed working and moved to Done.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed the Heap script had already been added. Product owner verified and moved to Done.
